pr.title: Establish Ember's staging frontend/deployment foundation
pr.rollback: Revert PR. Delete docs/staging/ if desired. No production or DB changes.

receipt.goal: Confirm current truth, lock staging topology (main=prod, staging branch=stable staging, PRs=preview), add docs/runbook and optional staging branch. No staging backend, seed data, or feature flags.
commands_run: cd web && pnpm install && pnpm run build
qa_steps: Review PR summary in plain English
Open Vercel preview URL; confirm app loads and basic navigation works
After merge: follow docs/staging/runbook.md for staging branch, Vercel Staging env, env vars, redeploy
receipt.rollback: Revert PR. No production secrets or DB changes.
receipt.decision_notes: Staging = branch-based; staging branch gets stable URL via Vercel Staging environment; same env key names as prod, values set in Vercel for Staging only.
